subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down in truth from the Kingdom of God, the All-Powerful, the Most Exalted, the Most Great. Every word hath proceeded from the Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل بالحق من ملکوت الله المقتدر العلی العظیم کل کلمه ظهرت من القلم
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
